description: Legal query regarding an inheritance, draft. The brother of the deceased had apparently not paid anything to the widow. The bulk of the query is in Judaeo-Arabic, with four lines of Arabic script at the bottom. At least the first three lines of the Arabic appear to be related (they twice mention Sayyidnā). On verso there is piyyuṭ.
description_he: שאלה משפטית על ירושה, טיוטה; אחי המנוח לא שילם לאלמנה; עיקר ביהודית-ערבית עם ארבע שורות בכתב ערבי; ורסו: פיוט
